last_sleep_summary: Sleep #6 — Haiku single-call recall, multi-review refactor, BID/BIV skill packs. Created haiku-recall-architecture knowledge file documenting the single claude CLI call design (corpus index in system prompt, 8K cap, execFileSync safety, mode matrix). Updated memory-recall-bm25 feature PRD with 9 new acceptance criteria. Updated multi-reviewer-pattern knowledge (coordinator removed, v1.1). Updated decision-mem0-vs-bm25-recall with Haiku evolution note. 3 new tasks created (haiku-recall-extraction, business-idea-discovery-skill, business-idea-validation-skill). multi-review-skill body reconciled (coordinator references removed throughout). All 4 tasks at in_review under v0.5.0. 3 changelog entries added. 2 memory decisions recorded. soul.md priority updated to v0.5.0.
